it.explanation: Corea del Sud e Giappone ospitarono insieme l'edizione del 2002, la prima organizzata in più nazioni. Il torneo Football 2026 va oltre, con tre paesi ospitanti.

ja.question: 2002年の大会は、2か国が共同で開催した初めての大会だった。
ja.explanation: 2002年は韓国と日本が共同開催し、複数国による初の大会となりました。Football 2026 は3か国による共同開催で、さらにその先を行きます。

ko.question: 2002년 대회는 두 나라가 공동 개최한 첫 대회였다.
ko.explanation: 2002년에는 대한민국과 일본이 공동으로 개최하여 여러 나라가 함께 치른 첫 대회가 되었습니다. Football 2026 대회는 세 나라가 공동 개최하며 한 걸음 더 나아갑니다.

pt-BR.question: O torneio de 2002 foi o primeiro a ser sediado em conjunto por dois países.
pt-BR.explanation: Coreia do Sul e Japão sediaram juntas em 2002, tornando-a a primeira edição realizada em mais de um país. O torneio Football 2026 vai além, com três países-sede.

zh-Hans.question: 2002年的赛事是首届由两个国家共同主办的赛事。
zh-Hans.explanation: 韩国和日本在2002年共同主办，使其成为首届由多个国家联合举办的赛事。Football 2026 更进一步，由三个国家共同主办。

questions.question: Who is this legendary Brazilian forward?
questions.explanation: Pelé won three titles (1958, 1962, 1970) and scored 12 goals across four editions. Widely regarded as one of the greatest players ever.

ar.question: من هو هذا المهاجم البرازيلي الأسطوري؟
ar.explanation: فاز بيليه بثلاثة ألقاب (1958، 1962، 1970) وسجّل 12 هدفًا في أربع نسخ. يُعتبر على نطاق واسع من أعظم اللاعبين على الإطلاق.

de.question: Wer ist dieser legendäre brasilianische Stürmer?
de.explanation: Pelé gewann drei Titel (1958, 1962, 1970) und erzielte 12 Tore in vier Turnieren. Er gilt weithin als einer der größten Spieler aller Zeiten.

es.question: ¿Quién es este legendario delantero brasileño?
es.explanation: Pelé ganó tres títulos (1958, 1962, 1970) y marcó 12 goles en cuatro ediciones. Es ampliamente considerado uno de los mejores jugadores de la historia.

es-ES.question: ¿Quién es este legendario delantero brasileño?
es-ES.explanation: Pelé ganó tres títulos (1958, 1962, 1970) y marcó 12 goles en cuatro ediciones. Está considerado uno de los mejores jugadores de todos los tiempos.

fr.question: Qui est ce légendaire attaquant brésilien ?
fr.explanation: Pelé a remporté trois titres (1958, 1962, 1970) et inscrit 12 buts sur quatre éditions. Il est largement considéré comme l'un des plus grands joueurs de tous les temps.

it.question: Chi è questo leggendario attaccante brasiliano?
it.explanation: Pelé ha vinto tre titoli (1958, 1962, 1970) e segnato 12 gol in quattro edizioni. È considerato da molti uno dei più grandi giocatori di sempre.

ja.question: この伝説的なブラジル人フォワードは誰でしょう？
ja.explanation: ペレは3度の優勝（1958年、1962年、1970年）を果たし、4大会で通算12得点を記録しました。史上最高の選手の一人として広く称えられています。

ko.question: 이 전설적인 브라질 공격수는 누구일까요?
ko.explanation: 펠레는 세 차례 우승(1958년, 1962년, 1970년)을 차지했으며 네 번의 대회에서 통산 12골을 기록했습니다. 역대 최고의 선수 중 한 명으로 널리 평가받습니다.

pt-BR.question: Quem é este lendário atacante brasileiro?
pt-BR.explanation: Pelé conquistou três títulos (1958, 1962, 1970) e marcou 12 gols em quatro edições. É amplamente considerado um dos maiores jogadores de todos os tempos.

zh-Hans.question: 这位传奇的巴西前锋是谁？
zh-Hans.explanation: 贝利赢得过三次冠军（1958年、1962年、1970年），并在四届赛事中共打进12球。他被广泛视为有史以来最伟大的球员之一。

questions.question: Who is this French midfielder and manager?
questions.explanation: Zinedine Zidane led France to their first title in 1998, scoring twice in the final. His 2006 final headbutt on Materazzi became one of football's most infamous moments.

ar.question: من هو هذا اللاعب والمدرب الفرنسي في خط الوسط؟
ar.explanation: قاد زين الدين زيدان فرنسا إلى لقبها الأول عام 1998، مسجلاً هدفين في النهائي. وأصبحت نطحته للاعب ماتيراتزي في نهائي 2006 واحدة من أكثر اللحظات إثارة للجدل في تاريخ كرة القدم.

de.question: Wer ist dieser französische Mittelfeldspieler und Trainer?
de.explanation: Zinedine Zidane führte Frankreich 1998 zum ersten Titel und traf im Finale zweimal. Sein Kopfstoß gegen Materazzi im Finale 2006 wurde zu einem der berüchtigtsten Momente des Fußballs.

es.question: ¿Quién es este mediocampista y entrenador francés?
es.explanation: Zinedine Zidane llevó a Francia a su primer título en 1998, anotando dos goles en la final. Su cabezazo a Materazzi en la final de 2006 se convirtió en uno de los momentos más polémicos del fútbol.

es-ES.question: ¿Quién es este centrocampista y entrenador francés?
es-ES.explanation: Zinedine Zidane llevó a Francia a su primer título en 1998, marcando dos goles en la final. Su cabezazo a Materazzi en la final de 2006 se convirtió en uno de los momentos más polémicos del fútbol.

fr.question: Qui est ce milieu de terrain et entraîneur français ?
fr.explanation: Zinedine Zidane a mené la France à son premier titre en 1998, en inscrivant un doublé en finale. Son coup de tête sur Materazzi lors de la finale de 2006 est devenu l'un des moments les plus tristement célèbres du football.

it.question: Chi è questo centrocampista e allenatore francese?
it.explanation: Zinedine Zidane portò la Francia al suo primo titolo nel 1998, segnando due gol in finale. La sua testata a Materazzi nella finale del 2006 è diventata uno dei momenti più famigerati del calcio.

ja.question: このフランス人ミッドフィルダー兼監督は誰でしょう？
options: ジネディーヌ・ジダン
ミシェル・プラティニ
パトリック・ヴィエラ
ja.explanation: ジネディーヌ・ジダンは1998年にフランスを初優勝へと導き、決勝で2得点を挙げました。2006年の決勝でマテラッツィに見舞った頭突きは、サッカー史上最も悪名高い瞬間の一つとなりました。

ko.question: 이 프랑스 미드필더이자 감독은 누구일까요?
ko.explanation: 지네딘 지단은 1998년 프랑스를 첫 우승으로 이끌며 결승에서 두 골을 넣었습니다. 2006년 결승에서 마테라치에게 가한 박치기는 축구 역사상 가장 악명 높은 순간 중 하나가 되었습니다.

pt-BR.question: Quem é este meio-campista e treinador francês?
pt-BR.explanation: Zinedine Zidane levou a França ao seu primeiro título em 1998, marcando dois gols na final. Sua cabeçada em Materazzi na final de 2006 se tornou um dos momentos mais infames do futebol.

zh-Hans.question: 这位法国中场兼教练是谁？
zh-Hans.explanation: 齐内丁·齐达内带领法国在1998年首次夺冠，并在决赛中梅开二度。他在2006年决赛中头顶马特拉齐的一幕成为足坛最臭名昭著的时刻之一。

questions.question: Who is this Brazilian striker who scored 15 goals across four editions?
questions.explanation: Ronaldo Nazário scored 15 goals across four editions (1998–2010), winning the Golden Boot in 2002 with eight goals as Brazil took the title.

ar.question: من هو هذا المهاجم البرازيلي الذي سجل 15 هدفاً عبر أربع نسخ؟
ar.explanation: سجّل رونالدو نازاريو 15 هدفاً عبر أربع نسخ (1998–2010)، وفاز بجائزة الحذاء الذهبي عام 2002 بثمانية أهداف عندما توّجت البرازيل باللقب.

de.question: Wer ist dieser brasilianische Stürmer, der über vier Turniere hinweg 15 Tore erzielte?
de.explanation: Ronaldo Nazário erzielte über vier Turniere (1998–2010) insgesamt 15 Tore und gewann 2002 mit acht Treffern den Goldenen Schuh, als Brasilien den Titel holte.

es.question: ¿Quién es este delantero brasileño que marcó 15 goles a lo largo de cuatro ediciones?
es.explanation: Ronaldo Nazário marcó 15 goles en cuatro ediciones (1998–2010), ganando la Bota de Oro en 2002 con ocho goles mientras Brasil se quedaba con el título.

es-ES.question: ¿Quién es este delantero brasileño que marcó 15 goles a lo largo de cuatro ediciones?
es-ES.explanation: Ronaldo Nazário marcó 15 goles en cuatro ediciones (1998–2010) y ganó la Bota de Oro en 2002 con ocho goles, mientras Brasil se llevaba el título.

fr.question: Qui est cet attaquant brésilien qui a inscrit 15 buts sur quatre éditions ?
fr.explanation: Ronaldo Nazário a marqué 15 buts sur quatre éditions (1998–2010), remportant le Soulier d'or en 2002 avec huit buts alors que le Brésil décrochait le titre.

it.question: Chi è questo attaccante brasiliano che ha segnato 15 gol in quattro edizioni?
it.explanation: Ronaldo Nazário ha segnato 15 gol in quattro edizioni (1998–2010), conquistando la Scarpa d'Oro nel 2002 con otto reti mentre il Brasile si aggiudicava il titolo.

ja.question: 4大会で15得点を挙げたこのブラジル人ストライカーは誰でしょう？
ja.explanation: ロナウド・ナザーリオは4大会（1998〜2010年）で通算15得点を記録し、2002年にはブラジルの優勝とともに8得点で得点王に輝きました。

ko.question: 네 개 대회에서 15골을 넣은 이 브라질 공격수는 누구일까요?
ko.explanation: 호나우두 나자리우는 네 개 대회(1998~2010년)에서 통산 15골을 기록했으며, 2002년에는 8골로 득점왕에 오르며 브라질의 우승을 이끌었습니다.

pt-BR.question: Quem é esse atacante brasileiro que marcou 15 gols ao longo de quatro edições?
pt-BR.explanation: Ronaldo Nazário marcou 15 gols em quatro edições (1998–2010), conquistando a Chuteira de Ouro em 2002 com oito gols enquanto o Brasil levava o título.

zh-Hans.question: 这位在四届赛事中打入15球的巴西前锋是谁？
zh-Hans.explanation: 罗纳尔多·纳扎里奥在四届赛事（1998–2010）中共打入15球，并在2002年以8粒进球荣膺金靴奖，帮助巴西夺冠。

questions.question: Who is this Argentine forward who finally lifted the trophy in 2022?
questions.explanation: Lionel Messi led Argentina to victory over France in 2022 at his fifth tournament. He scored seven goals including two in the final.

ar.question: من هو هذا المهاجم الأرجنتيني الذي رفع الكأس أخيرًا في 2022؟
ar.explanation: قاد ليونيل ميسي الأرجنتين إلى الفوز على فرنسا في 2022 في مشاركته الخامسة بالبطولة. وسجّل سبعة أهداف من بينها هدفان في المباراة النهائية.

de.question: Wer ist dieser argentinische Stürmer, der 2022 endlich den Pokal in die Höhe stemmte?
de.explanation: Lionel Messi führte Argentinien 2022 bei seinem fünften Turnier zum Sieg über Frankreich. Er erzielte sieben Tore, darunter zwei im Finale.

es.question: ¿Quién es este delantero argentino que por fin levantó el trofeo en 2022?
es.explanation: Lionel Messi llevó a Argentina a vencer a Francia en 2022, en su quinto torneo. Marcó siete goles, dos de ellos en la final.

es-ES.question: ¿Quién es este delantero argentino que por fin levantó el trofeo en 2022?
es-ES.explanation: Lionel Messi condujo a Argentina a la victoria sobre Francia en 2022, en su quinto torneo. Marcó siete goles, dos de ellos en la final.

fr.question: Qui est cet attaquant argentin qui a enfin soulevé le trophée en 2022 ?
fr.explanation: Lionel Messi a mené l'Argentine à la victoire face à la France en 2022, lors de son cinquième tournoi. Il a inscrit sept buts, dont deux en finale.

it.question: Chi è questo attaccante argentino che ha finalmente alzato il trofeo nel 2022?
it.explanation: Lionel Messi ha guidato l'Argentina alla vittoria sulla Francia nel 2022, al suo quinto torneo. Ha segnato sette gol, due dei quali in finale.

ja.question: 2022年についにトロフィーを掲げたこのアルゼンチンのフォワードは誰でしょう？
options: ディエゴ・マラドーナ
ガブリエル・バティストゥータ
ja.explanation: リオネル・メッシは5度目の大会となった2022年に、アルゼンチンをフランスとの試合での勝利へと導きました。決勝での2得点を含む7ゴールを記録しました。

ko.question: 2022년에 마침내 우승 트로피를 들어 올린 이 아르헨티나 공격수는 누구일까요?
ko.explanation: 리오넬 메시는 다섯 번째 대회였던 2022년에 아르헨티나를 이끌고 프랑스를 꺾으며 우승했습니다. 그는 결승전 2골을 포함해 총 7골을 기록했습니다.

pt-BR.question: Quem é este atacante argentino que finalmente levantou o troféu em 2022?
pt-BR.explanation: Lionel Messi liderou a Argentina na vitória sobre a França em 2022, em seu quinto torneio. Ele marcou sete gols, sendo dois na final.

zh-Hans.question: 这位在2022年终于举起奖杯的阿根廷前锋是谁？
options: 加布里埃尔·巴蒂斯图塔
zh-Hans.explanation: 在他参加的第五届赛事——2022年的比赛中，莱昂内尔·梅西带领阿根廷击败法国夺冠。他打进七粒进球，其中两球来自决赛。

questions.question: Who is this Portuguese captain who has scored at five consecutive editions?
questions.explanation: Cristiano Ronaldo scored at every edition from 2006 to 2022 — five consecutive tournaments. He holds the record for most international goals by any male player.

ar.question: من هو هذا القائد البرتغالي الذي سجّل في خمس نسخ متتالية؟
ar.explanation: سجّل كريستيانو رونالدو في كل نسخة من 2006 إلى 2022 — خمس بطولات متتالية. وهو يحمل الرقم القياسي لأكثر الأهداف الدولية لأي لاعب رجل.

de.question: Wer ist dieser portugiesische Kapitän, der bei fünf Turnieren in Folge getroffen hat?
de.explanation: Cristiano Ronaldo traf bei jeder Ausgabe von 2006 bis 2022 — fünf aufeinanderfolgende Turniere. Er hält den Rekord für die meisten Länderspieltore aller männlichen Spieler.

es.question: ¿Quién es este capitán portugués que marcó en cinco ediciones consecutivas?
es.explanation: Cristiano Ronaldo marcó en cada edición desde 2006 hasta 2022, cinco torneos consecutivos. Tiene el récord de más goles internacionales de cualquier jugador masculino.

es-ES.question: ¿Quién es este capitán portugués que ha marcado en cinco ediciones consecutivas?
es-ES.explanation: Cristiano Ronaldo marcó en todas las ediciones desde 2006 hasta 2022: cinco torneos seguidos. Posee el récord de más goles internacionales de cualquier jugador masculino.

fr.question: Quel est ce capitaine portugais qui a marqué lors de cinq éditions consécutives ?
fr.explanation: Cristiano Ronaldo a marqué à chaque édition de 2006 à 2022 — cinq tournois consécutifs. Il détient le record du plus grand nombre de buts en sélection pour un joueur masculin.

it.question: Chi è questo capitano portoghese che ha segnato in cinque edizioni consecutive?
it.explanation: Cristiano Ronaldo ha segnato in ogni edizione dal 2006 al 2022, cinque tornei consecutivi. Detiene il record di gol in nazionale tra tutti i giocatori maschi.

ja.question: 5大会連続でゴールを決めたこのポルトガル代表のキャプテンは誰でしょう？
options: クリスティアーノ・ロナウド
ブルーノ・フェルナンデス
ja.explanation: クリスティアーノ・ロナウドは2006年から2022年までのすべての大会でゴールを決め、5大会連続となりました。彼は男子選手による国際試合最多得点の記録を保持しています。

ko.question: 5개 대회 연속으로 골을 넣은 이 포르투갈 주장은 누구일까요?
ko.explanation: 크리스티아누 호날두는 2006년부터 2022년까지 모든 대회에서 골을 넣어 5개 대회 연속 득점을 기록했습니다. 그는 남자 선수 중 A매치 최다 득점 기록을 보유하고 있습니다.

pt-BR.question: Quem é este capitão português que marcou em cinco edições consecutivas?
pt-BR.explanation: Cristiano Ronaldo marcou em todas as edições de 2006 a 2022 — cinco torneios consecutivos. Ele detém o recorde de mais gols internacionais entre todos os jogadores masculinos.

zh-Hans.question: 这位连续五届都进球的葡萄牙队长是谁？
options: 克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多
zh-Hans.explanation: 克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多从2006年到2022年的每一届都有进球，连续五届赛事破门。他保持着男子球员国家队进球最多的纪录。

questions.question: Who is this French forward who scored a hat trick in the 2022 final?
questions.explanation: Kylian Mbappé scored a hat trick in the 2022 final and won the Golden Boot with eight goals. He first won the title as a teenager in 2018.

ar.question: من هو هذا المهاجم الفرنسي الذي سجّل ثلاثية في نهائي 2022؟
ar.explanation: سجّل كيليان مبابي ثلاثية في نهائي 2022 وفاز بجائزة الحذاء الذهبي برصيد ثمانية أهداف. وكان قد أحرز اللقب لأول مرة وهو مراهق عام 2018.

de.question: Wer ist dieser französische Stürmer, der im Finale 2022 einen Hattrick erzielte?
de.explanation: Kylian Mbappé erzielte im Finale 2022 einen Hattrick und gewann mit acht Toren den Goldenen Schuh. Seinen ersten Titel holte er 2018 noch als Teenager.

es.question: ¿Quién es este delantero francés que marcó un triplete en la final de 2022?
es.explanation: Kylian Mbappé marcó un triplete en la final de 2022 y ganó la Bota de Oro con ocho goles. Ya había conquistado el título por primera vez en 2018, cuando todavía era un adolescente.

es-ES.question: ¿Quién es este delantero francés que marcó un triplete en la final de 2022?
es-ES.explanation: Kylian Mbappé marcó un triplete en la final de 2022 y se llevó la Bota de Oro con ocho goles. Ya había logrado el título por primera vez en 2018, siendo aún un adolescente.

fr.question: Qui est cet attaquant français qui a inscrit un triplé lors de la finale de 2022 ?
fr.explanation: Kylian Mbappé a marqué un triplé en finale 2022 et a remporté le Soulier d'or avec huit buts. Il avait déjà décroché le titre dès 2018, alors qu'il n'était qu'un adolescent.

it.question: Chi è questo attaccante francese che ha segnato una tripletta nella finale del 2022?
it.explanation: Kylian Mbappé ha realizzato una tripletta nella finale del 2022 e ha vinto la Scarpa d'Oro con otto gol. Aveva già conquistato il titolo nel 2018, quando era ancora un adolescente.

ja.question: 2022年の決勝でハットトリックを決めたこのフランス人フォワードは誰でしょう？
options: アントワーヌ・グリーズマン
ja.explanation: キリアン・ムバッペは2022年の決勝でハットトリックを達成し、8ゴールで得点王に輝きました。彼は2018年に10代で初めてタイトルを手にしています。

ko.question: 2022년 결승전에서 해트트릭을 기록한 이 프랑스 공격수는 누구일까요?
ko.explanation: 킬리안 음바페는 2022년 결승전에서 해트트릭을 기록하며 8골로 득점왕에 올랐습니다. 그는 2018년 10대 시절에 처음으로 우승을 차지한 바 있습니다.

pt-BR.question: Quem é esse atacante francês que marcou um hat-trick na final de 2022?
pt-BR.explanation: Kylian Mbappé marcou um hat-trick na final de 2022 e conquistou a Chuteira de Ouro com oito gols. Ele já havia vencido o título pela primeira vez em 2018, ainda adolescente.

zh-Hans.question: 这位在2022年决赛中上演帽子戏法的法国前锋是谁？
zh-Hans.explanation: 基利安·姆巴佩在2022年决赛中上演帽子戏法，并以八粒进球荣膺金靴奖。早在2018年，他还是个少年时就首次捧得冠军。

questions.question: Who is this Brazilian playmaker known for his dazzling skills and iconic smile?
questions.explanation: Ronaldinho was part of Brazil's 2002 winning squad and scored a memorable free kick against England in the quarterfinals. He won the Ballon d'Or in 2005.

ar.question: من هو صانع الألعاب البرازيلي المعروف بمهاراته المبهرة وابتسامته الأيقونية؟
ar.explanation: كان رونالدينيو ضمن تشكيلة البرازيل الفائزة عام 2002 وسجّل ركلة حرة لا تُنسى في مرمى إنجلترا في دور ربع النهائي. وقد فاز بالكرة الذهبية عام 2005.

de.question: Welcher brasilianische Spielmacher ist für seine atemberaubenden Tricks und sein unverwechselbares Lächeln bekannt?
de.explanation: Ronaldinho gehörte 2002 zur siegreichen brasilianischen Mannschaft und erzielte im Viertelfinale einen unvergesslichen Freistoß gegen England. 2005 gewann er den Ballon d'Or.

es.question: ¿Quién es este creador de juego brasileño conocido por su deslumbrante habilidad y su icónica sonrisa?
es.explanation: Ronaldinho formó parte del plantel brasileño campeón en 2002 y marcó un memorable tiro libre ante Inglaterra en los cuartos de final. Ganó el Balón de Oro en 2005.

es-ES.question: ¿Quién es este creador de juego brasileño conocido por su deslumbrante habilidad y su icónica sonrisa?
es-ES.explanation: Ronaldinho formó parte de la selección brasileña campeona en 2002 y marcó un memorable tiro libre ante Inglaterra en los cuartos de final. Ganó el Balón de Oro en 2005.

fr.question: Quel est ce meneur de jeu brésilien connu pour ses dribbles éblouissants et son sourire emblématique ?
fr.explanation: Ronaldinho faisait partie de l'équipe brésilienne sacrée en 2002 et a inscrit un coup franc mémorable contre l'Angleterre en quarts de finale. Il a remporté le Ballon d'Or en 2005.

it.question: Chi è questo regista offensivo brasiliano noto per le sue giocate spettacolari e il suo sorriso iconico?
it.explanation: Ronaldinho faceva parte della squadra brasiliana campione nel 2002 e segnò un memorabile calcio di punizione contro l'Inghilterra nei quarti di finale. Vinse il Pallone d'Oro nel 2005.

ja.question: 華麗なテクニックと象徴的な笑顔で知られる、このブラジル人の司令塔は誰でしょう？
ja.explanation: ロナウジーニョは2002年に優勝したブラジル代表の一員で、準々決勝のイングランド戦で記憶に残るフリーキックを決めました。2005年にはバロンドールを受賞しました。

ko.question: 현란한 기술과 상징적인 미소로 유명한 이 브라질 플레이메이커는 누구일까요?
ko.explanation: 호나우지뉴는 2002년 우승한 브라질 대표팀의 일원으로, 8강전에서 잉글랜드를 상대로 기억에 남는 프리킥 골을 넣었습니다. 그는 2005년 발롱도르를 수상했습니다.

pt-BR.question: Quem é este meia armador brasileiro conhecido por suas jogadas deslumbrantes e seu sorriso icônico?
pt-BR.explanation: Ronaldinho fez parte do elenco campeão do Brasil em 2002 e marcou uma cobrança de falta memorável contra a Inglaterra nas quartas de final. Ele ganhou a Bola de Ouro em 2005.

zh-Hans.question: 这位以炫目球技和标志性笑容著称的巴西组织核心是谁？
zh-Hans.explanation: 罗纳尔迪尼奥是巴西2002年夺冠阵容的一员，并在四分之一决赛对阵英格兰时打入一记令人难忘的任意球。他于2005年荣获金球奖。

questions.question: Who is this Croatian midfielder who led his country to the 2018 final?
questions.explanation: Luka Modrić captained Croatia to the 2018 final and won the Golden Ball as the tournament's best player. He also led them to third place in 2022.

questions.question: Who is this Brazilian forward playing at the 2026 tournament?
questions.explanation: Neymar is Brazil's all-time leading scorer and is competing at his third edition in 2026 after injuries limited his 2014 and 2022 campaigns.

ar.question: من هو هذا المهاجم البرازيلي المشارك في بطولة 2026؟
ar.explanation: نيمار هو الهداف التاريخي الأول للبرازيل ويشارك في نسخته الثالثة في 2026 بعدما حدّت الإصابات من مشاركتيه في 2014 و2022.

de.question: Wer ist dieser brasilianische Stürmer beim Turnier 2026?
de.explanation: Neymar ist Brasiliens erfolgreichster Torschütze aller Zeiten und nimmt 2026 zum dritten Mal teil, nachdem Verletzungen seine Auftritte 2014 und 2022 beeinträchtigt hatten.

es.question: ¿Quién es este delantero brasileño que juega en el torneo de 2026?
es.explanation: Neymar es el máximo goleador histórico de Brasil y disputa su tercera edición en 2026, luego de que las lesiones limitaran sus participaciones en 2014 y 2022.

es-ES.question: ¿Quién es este delantero brasileño que juega en el torneo de 2026?
es-ES.explanation: Neymar es el máximo goleador histórico de Brasil y disputa su tercera edición en 2026, después de que las lesiones limitaran sus participaciones en 2014 y 2022.

fr.question: Qui est cet attaquant brésilien qui dispute le tournoi 2026 ?
fr.explanation: Neymar est le meilleur buteur de l'histoire du Brésil et participe à sa troisième édition en 2026, après que des blessures ont écourté ses parcours en 2014 et 2022.

it.question: Chi è questo attaccante brasiliano in campo al torneo del 2026?
it.explanation: Neymar è il miglior marcatore di sempre del Brasile e disputa la sua terza edizione nel 2026, dopo che gli infortuni avevano limitato le sue partecipazioni del 2014 e del 2022.

ja.question: 2026年の大会に出場しているこのブラジル人フォワードは誰でしょう？
options: ヴィニシウス・ジュニオール
ja.explanation: ネイマールはブラジル代表歴代最多得点者で、2014年と2022年は負傷で出場が制限されたものの、2026年は自身3度目の大会出場となります。

ko.question: 2026 대회에 출전하는 이 브라질 공격수는 누구일까요?
ko.explanation: 네이마르는 브라질 역대 최다 득점자로, 2014년과 2022년에는 부상으로 출전이 제한됐지만 2026년에 세 번째 대회 출전을 맞이합니다.

pt-BR.question: Quem é este atacante brasileiro que joga no torneio de 2026?
pt-BR.explanation: Neymar é o maior artilheiro da história do Brasil e disputa sua terceira edição em 2026, depois que lesões limitaram suas campanhas em 2014 e 2022.

zh-Hans.question: 这位征战2026赛事的巴西前锋是谁？
zh-Hans.explanation: 内马尔是巴西队史第一射手，在2014年和2022年因伤影响表现后，他将在2026年迎来个人第三次大赛之旅。

questions.question: Who is this Ivorian striker, one of Africa's greatest players?
questions.explanation: Didier Drogba represented Ivory Coast at three editions (2006, 2010, 2014). He's credited with helping to broker a ceasefire in the Ivorian civil war through football.

questions.question: Which South American nation hosted the tournament in 1978?
questions.explanation: Argentina hosted and won the 1978 edition, defeating the Netherlands 3-1 in extra time at Buenos Aires. The tournament remains one of the most politically controversial, held during Argentina's military dictatorship under Jorge Videla.

questions.question: The 1982 edition in Spain was the first to expand beyond 16 teams. How many competed?
questions.explanation: Spain 1982 increased the field from 16 to 24 teams, introducing a second group stage before the semi-finals. The 24-team format lasted four editions (1982-1994) before expanding to 32 in France 1998.

questions.question: The infamous 'Battle of Santiago' at the 1962 tournament was a notoriously violent match between which two countries?
questions.explanation: The 1962 group-stage clash between host nation Chile and Italy was so violent that police had to intervene on the pitch. Two Italian players were sent off. BBC commentator David Coleman famously introduced the footage by calling it 'the most stupid, appalling, disgusting, and disgraceful exhibition of football.'

questions.question: The 'Disgrace of Gijón' at the 1982 tournament involved a suspicious match between West Germany and which other team?
questions.explanation: After West Germany scored early, both teams appeared to stop competing, knowing a narrow German win would send both through at Algeria's expense. The scandal led to a permanent rule change — from 1986 onward, final group-stage matches in each group kick off simultaneously.

questions.question: The 1990 edition in Italy set a then-record for the fewest average goals per game. Approximately how many?
questions.explanation: Italia 90 averaged just 2.21 goals per game, the lowest in tournament history. The ultra-defensive style prompted several rule changes, including awarding three points for a win instead of two (introduced in 1994) and the back-pass rule banning goalkeepers from handling deliberate passes from teammates.

questions.question: Which edition was the first to be broadcast worldwide in color television?
questions.explanation: The 1970 tournament in Mexico was the first with full color TV broadcasts globally. This is partly why that edition's iconic imagery — Brazil's brilliant yellow shirts, Pelé's artistry, Gordon Banks' legendary save — remains so vivid in football lore. The Telstar match ball was designed with black and white panels specifically for TV visibility.

questions.question: How many nations competed in the inaugural 1930 tournament in Uruguay?
questions.explanation: Only 13 teams entered the first edition, with just four European nations making the long sea voyage across the Atlantic. Many European countries declined to participate due to the expense and time required for ocean travel, nearly causing a diplomatic rift with South America.

questions.question: Whose spectacular save against Pelé at the 1970 tournament is widely considered the greatest save in football history?
questions.explanation: England goalkeeper Gordon Banks pulled off an incredible diving save to deny Pelé's downward header in a 1970 group-stage match against Brazil. Pelé himself later called it 'the save of the century.' Despite Banks' heroics, Brazil won the match 1-0 and went on to win the tournament.

questions.question: Who won the Golden Boot at the 1978 tournament with 6 goals, including 2 in the final?
questions.explanation: Mario Kempes was the star of the 1978 tournament on home soil, scoring 6 goals to earn the Golden Boot. Remarkably, he didn't score in the group stage — all 6 came in the second round and final. His two goals in the final against the Netherlands sealed Argentina's first title.

questions.question: Which Italian striker won the 1982 Golden Boot with 6 goals after returning from a match-fixing ban?
questions.explanation: Paolo Rossi had served a two-year ban for involvement in a match-fixing scandal before being selected for Spain 1982. He went on one of football's most remarkable redemption arcs — scoring a hat-trick against Brazil, then goals in the semi-final and final. He won the Golden Boot, Golden Ball, and the tournament.

questions.question: Who was the first person in history to win the tournament as both a player and a head coach?
questions.explanation: Brazilian Mário Zagallo won as a player in 1958 and 1962, then coached Brazil to victory in 1970 — the first person to achieve this double. Franz Beckenbauer later matched the feat (1974/1990), followed by Didier Deschamps (1998/2018). Johan Cruyff, despite being one of the greatest players, never won the tournament.

questions.question: When Pelé was injured during the 1962 tournament, which Brazilian winger stepped up to lead the team to victory?
questions.explanation: Garrincha, nicknamed 'Alegria do Povo' (Joy of the People), was the undisputed star of the 1962 tournament after Pelé suffered a groin injury in the second group match. Despite having legs of different lengths due to a childhood illness, Garrincha's dribbling was mesmerizing, and he scored in both the quarter-final and semi-final.

questions.question: German striker Miroslav Klose scored at four consecutive editions. Which were they?
questions.explanation: Klose scored across four straight editions: 5 goals in 2002, 5 in 2006, 4 in 2010, and 2 in 2014. Born in Opole, Poland, he moved to Germany as a child and became one of the tournament's most prolific scorers. His trademark acrobatic somersault celebration became iconic.

questions.question: Who missed the decisive penalty in the 1994 final shootout, handing Brazil the title?
questions.explanation: Roberto Baggio blazed his penalty over the crossbar in the 1994 final shootout, giving Brazil a 3-2 victory. It remains one of football's most heartbreaking moments. Despite the miss, Baggio had almost single-handedly carried Italy to the final, scoring 5 goals in the knockout rounds including a last-minute equalizer against Nigeria.

questions.question: Which was the last tournament that Germany entered as 'West Germany' before reunification?
questions.explanation: West Germany won the 1990 tournament in Italy — their third title — just months before German reunification in October 1990. The unified German team first competed under simply 'Germany' at the 1994 edition in the United States.

questions.question: Which nation produced one of the biggest upsets in tournament history by defeating Argentina 2-1 in their 2022 group opener?
questions.explanation: Saudi Arabia came from behind to beat Lionel Messi's Argentina 2-1 in one of the most stunning results in tournament history. Both Saudi goals came within five minutes of each other early in the second half. The day was declared a national holiday in Saudi Arabia. Argentina recovered from the shock to win the entire tournament.

questions.question: The 1994 tournament in the United States set a record that still stands. What was it?
questions.explanation: The 1994 edition drew over 3.58 million total spectators, a record that has endured for over 30 years. The average attendance of nearly 69,000 per match was boosted by the use of massive American football stadiums. This record may finally be broken in 2026, with even larger US stadiums and 104 matches (vs. 52 in 1994).

questions.question: When North Korea returned to the tournament in 2010 after a 44-year absence, what happened?
options: They lost all three group matches
They advanced to the Round of 16
They beat one team but were eliminated
questions.explanation: North Korea's return was painful: they lost to Brazil 2-1 (after briefly leading!), Portugal 7-0, and Ivory Coast 3-0. The 7-0 thrashing by Portugal was one of the most lopsided results in modern tournament history. Their previous appearance had been the famous 1966 run where they stunned Italy.

questions.question: Which African nation made history in 2022 by becoming the first from their continent to reach a tournament semi-final?
questions.explanation: Morocco's 2022 run was sensational — they topped a group containing Belgium and Croatia, then knocked out Spain on penalties and Portugal 1-0 before losing to France in the semi-finals. They became the first African and first Arab nation to reach a tournament semi-final, igniting celebrations across the continent and the Arab world.

questions.question: Which country has appeared at the most editions of the tournament without ever winning it?
questions.explanation: Mexico has appeared at 18 editions — more than any nation that hasn't lifted the trophy. Despite being frequent hosts and consistent qualifiers from CONCACAF, Mexico has a so-called 'quinto partido' (fifth match) curse, having been eliminated in the Round of 16 in seven consecutive tournaments from 1994 to 2018.

questions.question: At the 2022 tournament, Japan stunned the world by beating which two former champions in the group stage?
questions.explanation: Japan came from behind to beat Germany 2-1 and Spain 2-1 in Group E, winning the group and sending Germany home. Both comebacks followed an identical pattern — falling behind 1-0 in the first half, then scoring twice after halftime. Japan's tactical flexibility, with coach Hajime Moriyasu making bold substitutions, was key.

questions.question: A corner kick is awarded when the ball crosses the goal line (without a goal being scored) and was last touched by whom?
questions.explanation: When a defender is the last to touch the ball before it crosses their own goal line, the attacking team gets a corner kick from the nearest corner arc. If an attacker was the last to touch it, the defending team receives a goal kick instead. Corners are a valuable attacking weapon — roughly 3% result in a goal at the professional level.

questions.question: Can a goal be scored directly from a throw-in?
options: Only if it bounces before crossing the line
questions.explanation: A goal cannot be scored directly from a throw-in. If the ball enters the opponent's goal directly from a throw-in without being touched by another player, a goal kick is awarded. If it enters the thrower's own goal, a corner kick is given. The throw-in is the only restart in football performed with the hands.

questions.question: Once a goalkeeper picks up the ball, how many seconds do they have to release it?
questions.explanation: Law 12 states goalkeepers must release the ball within 6 seconds of controlling it with their hands. This is widely considered the least-enforced rule in football — referees typically warn before penalizing, and the infraction results in an indirect free kick. Time-wasting goalkeepers have led to calls for stricter enforcement.

questions.question: When the referee sees a foul but the fouled team keeps possession in a favorable position, what do they signal?
options: They wave a yellow card overhead
They point to the center circle
questions.explanation: The advantage signal — both arms extended forward and upward — tells players that the referee saw the foul but is allowing play to continue because stopping would disadvantage the fouled team. If the expected advantage doesn't materialize within a few seconds, the referee can still come back and award the original free kick.

questions.question: During regular play, if a penalty kick hits the post and bounces back, can the kicker score from the rebound?
options: Yes, any player can play the rebound
Only teammates can score, not the kicker
Only the goalkeeper can touch it next
questions.explanation: In regular play and extra time, if a penalty hits the post, crossbar, or rebounds off the goalkeeper, the ball is live and any player — including the kicker — can score from it. In a penalty shootout, however, there are no rebounds: each kick ends once the ball stops moving forward, goes out of play, or the goalkeeper makes a clear save.

questions.question: Guadalajara, a 2026 host city, is known as the birthplace of which two iconic Mexican cultural exports?
options: Día de los Muertos and piñatas
questions.explanation: Guadalajara, capital of Mexico's Jalisco state, is the cultural birthplace of both mariachi music and tequila (produced from blue agave grown in surrounding Jalisco highlands). Mexico's second-largest city, it also hosted group-stage matches in both 1970 and 1986.

questions.question: Estadio Akron, a 2026 venue in Guadalajara, is the home ground of which famous Mexican club?
questions.explanation: Estadio Akron is home to Chivas, one of Mexico's most beloved clubs and famously the only major Mexican team to field exclusively Mexican-born players — no foreign imports allowed. The modern stadium, which opened in 2010, seats around 49,850 and features a striking volcanic-inspired design.

questions.question: Gillette Stadium, a 2026 venue near Boston, is the home of which NFL team?
questions.explanation: Gillette Stadium sits in Foxborough, Massachusetts, about 30 miles southwest of downtown Boston. Seating approximately 65,878, it's also home to the New England Revolution of MLS. The stadium hosted multiple matches during the 1994 edition when the nearby Foxboro Stadium was used.

questions.question: Estadio BBVA, a 2026 venue in Monterrey, is the home ground of which club?
questions.explanation: Estadio BBVA is home to CF Monterrey, nicknamed 'Rayados' (the striped ones), one of Mexico's most successful clubs. The state-of-the-art stadium opened in 2015 and seats around 51,000. Monterrey, Mexico's third-largest city, is also home to rival club UANL Tigres, who play at the nearby Estadio Universitario.

questions.question: What is the most goals scored by a single player in one tournament match?
questions.explanation: Russia's Oleg Salenko scored 5 goals in a 6-1 win over Cameroon at the 1994 tournament, a record that still stands. Remarkably, Russia was eliminated in the group stage despite Salenko's heroics. He shared the Golden Boot that year with Bulgaria's Hristo Stoichkov, each finishing with 6 goals.

questions.question: The 2018 tournament in Russia set a record for the most own goals in a single edition. How many were there?
questions.explanation: Russia 2018 saw a staggering 12 own goals, more than double the previous record of 6 set in 1998. Faster-moving balls, aggressive high-pressing tactics, and the increased pace of the modern game put defenders under unprecedented pressure. Some of those own goals would have been credited to attackers in earlier eras before tracking technology improved.

questions.question: Which final produced the most total goals (excluding penalty shootouts)?
questions.explanation: The 1958 final saw 7 goals as a 17-year-old Pelé scored twice and Vavá added two more in Brazil's 5-2 demolition of host nation Sweden. It was Brazil's first title and announced them as a football superpower. The 2022 final matched the drama with 6 goals (3-3) but needed penalties to decide the winner.

questions.question: Which edition of the tournament was the first to feature an official mascot?
questions.explanation: The 1966 tournament in England introduced the tradition of official mascots with a lion named Willie wearing a Union Jack jersey. Every edition since has had its own mascot, from 1970's Juanito (a boy in a sombrero) to 2022's La'eeb (an animated keffiyeh). The tradition has since spread to nearly every major sporting event.

questions.question: Which company has manufactured the official match ball for every edition since 1970?
questions.explanation: Adidas has supplied every official ball since the 1970 Telstar, which became iconic with its black-and-white panel design for TV visibility. Each edition gets a uniquely designed ball — the Tango (1978-1998 era), Jabulani (2010), Brazuca (2014), Al Rihla (2022) — and the designs always spark lively debate among players and fans.

questions.question: The first tournament host country, Uruguay in 1930, also won the title.
questions.explanation: True! Uruguay hosted and won the inaugural 1930 edition, defeating Argentina 4-2 in the final at the Estadio Centenario in Montevideo before approximately 93,000 spectators. With a population of under 2 million at the time, Uruguay remains one of the smallest nations ever to win the tournament.

questions.question: No yellow or red cards were shown at the 1930 tournament.
questions.explanation: True! The card system wasn't introduced until the 1970 edition in Mexico. Before that, referees communicated cautions and dismissals verbally or with gestures. The card system was invented by English referee Ken Aston, who was inspired by traffic lights while driving home after a particularly confusing 1966 match.

questions.question: Pelé was injured and missed most of the 1962 tournament, but Brazil still won.
questions.explanation: True! Pelé tore a groin muscle in Brazil's second group match against Czechoslovakia and was sidelined for the rest of the tournament. Garrincha stepped into the spotlight as the tournament's star, leading Brazil to their second consecutive title. It showed the incredible depth of Brazilian talent in that era.

questions.question: A knockout match at the tournament can end in a draw.
questions.explanation: False! Every knockout match must produce a winner. If the score is level after 90 minutes, 30 minutes of extra time (two 15-minute halves) are played. If still tied, a penalty shootout decides the outcome. Only group-stage matches can end in a draw.

questions.question: A referee can be assigned to officiate a match involving their own country.
questions.explanation: False! To ensure impartiality, referees are never assigned to matches involving their own nation. Typically, officials come from a different confederation than either competing team. The referee committee carefully selects and assigns officials for each match to avoid even the appearance of bias.

questions.question: Goal-line technology was first used at the 2014 tournament in Brazil.
questions.explanation: True! Goal-line technology debuted at Brazil 2014, using high-speed cameras to instantly determine whether the ball fully crossed the line. Its adoption was spurred by several controversial incidents, most notably Frank Lampard's clearly valid goal against Germany in 2010 that was wrongly disallowed — a miss that might have changed the outcome of the match.

questions.question: Female referees officiated at the men's tournament for the first time in 2022.
questions.explanation: True! The 2022 edition made history by including female match officials for the first time. France's Stéphanie Frappart became the first woman to referee a men's tournament match (Costa Rica vs Germany), while Rwanda's Salima Mukansanga and Japan's Yoshimi Yamashita also served as officials during the tournament.

questions.question: Teams from all six football confederations have reached the tournament semi-finals.
questions.explanation: False! Five of six confederations have had semi-finalists: UEFA (Europe), CONMEBOL (South America), CONCACAF (USA in 1930), AFC (South Korea in 2002), and CAF (Morocco in 2022). The only confederation without a semi-finalist is OFC (Oceania), whose top footballing nation, Australia, moved to the Asian confederation in 2006.

questions.question: The golden goal rule (sudden death in extra time) was abolished after the 2002 tournament.
questions.explanation: True! The golden goal rule, where the first team to score in extra time immediately won, was used at the 1998 and 2002 editions. It was abolished in 2004 due to criticism that it made teams overly defensive in extra time, afraid one mistake would end the match. The 2006 edition returned to the traditional full 30-minute extra-time format.

questions.question: Multiple matches at the 2022 edition in Qatar had over 10 minutes of stoppage time added to a single half.
questions.explanation: True! Referees at the 2022 tournament added significantly more stoppage time than in any previous edition. England vs Iran saw a total of 27 minutes added across both halves. The approach was intended to maximize actual playing time by accounting for goal celebrations, substitutions, VAR reviews, and time-wasting. This trend has continued into subsequent editions.

questions.question: Who is this Argentine legend, famous for the 'Hand of God' and the 'Goal of the Century'?
questions.explanation: Diego Maradona captained Argentina to glory in 1986, scoring two of the most famous goals in football history against England in the quarter-finals — the controversial 'Hand of God' and the mesmerizing 60-meter solo run past five defenders known as the 'Goal of the Century.' He won the Golden Ball as the tournament's best player.

questions.question: Who is this German football icon, nicknamed 'Der Kaiser,' who revolutionized the sweeper role?
questions.explanation: Franz Beckenbauer captained West Germany to victory in 1974 and later coached them to win in 1990, becoming only the second person (after Mário Zagallo) to win as both player and manager. Nicknamed 'Der Kaiser' (The Emperor), he redefined the libero/sweeper role, turning defense into an art form of elegant ball-playing.

questions.question: Who is this German striker who scored at four consecutive editions from 2002 to 2014?
questions.explanation: Miroslav Klose scored 16 goals across four editions (2002-2014), making him one of the tournament's most prolific scorers. Born in Opole, Poland, he moved to Germany as a child and developed a reputation for fair play — he once told a referee to disallow a goal he had scored with his hand. His trademark somersault celebration is iconic.

questions.question: Who is this Brazilian right-back and captain who appeared in three consecutive tournament finals?
questions.explanation: Cafu (Marcos Evangelista de Moraes) appeared in three consecutive finals — 1994 (won), 1998 (lost), and 2002 (won) — the only player in history to achieve this feat. He captained the victorious 2002 side and earned 142 caps for Brazil, a record at the time. Known for his tireless runs up and down the right flank, he set the template for modern attacking full-backs.

questions.question: Who is this Italian goalkeeper who won the tournament in 2006 and is considered one of the greatest keepers ever?
questions.explanation: Gianluigi Buffon was the rock of Italy's 2006 triumph, conceding just two goals in the entire tournament (one an own goal, the other a Zidane penalty). He played in five editions (1998-2014), earning 176 caps for Italy — a record. His longevity was remarkable: he was still playing professional football into his mid-40s.
